# HHH Jobs

> HHH Jobs is an India-focused hiring, job search, campus placement, ATS, and career support platform for candidates, employers, recruiters, HR teams, campuses, and experienced professionals.

## Primary Site

- [Home](https://hhh-jobs.com/)
- [Latest Jobs](https://hhh-jobs.com/jobs)
- [Government Jobs](https://hhh-jobs.com/govt-jobs)
- [Companies Hiring](https://hhh-jobs.com/companies)
- [Free ATS Resume Checker](https://hhh-jobs.com/ats)
- [Services](https://hhh-jobs.com/services)
- [Employee Verification](https://hhh-jobs.com/emp-verify)

## Audience Pages

- [Job Seekers](https://hhh-jobs.com/job-seekers)
- [Freshers](https://hhh-jobs.com/freshers)
- [Recruiters and HR Teams](https://hhh-jobs.com/recruiters)
- [Campus Connect](https://hhh-jobs.com/campus-connect)
- [Experienced Professionals](https://hhh-jobs.com/veterans)
- [Retired Employees](https://hhh-jobs.com/retired-employee)

## Discovery and Crawl Files

- [XML Sitemap](https://hhh-jobs.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots.txt](https://hhh-jobs.com/robots.txt)
- [AI Discovery Pointer](https://hhh-jobs.com/ai.txt)
- [IndexNow Key](https://hhh-jobs.com/9e643b2a4e3245fcaef18e7a2c5479d1.txt)

## Support and Trust

- [About HHH Jobs](https://hhh-jobs.com/about-us)
- [Contact HHH Jobs](https://hhh-jobs.com/contact-us)
- [Help Center](https://hhh-jobs.com/help-center)
- [Privacy Policy](https://hhh-jobs.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms and Conditions](https://hhh-jobs.com/terms-and-conditions)
- [Trust and Safety](https://hhh-jobs.com/trust-and-safety)
- [Fraud Alert](https://hhh-jobs.com/fraud-alert)
- [Grievances](https://hhh-jobs.com/grievances)
- [Report an Issue](https://hhh-jobs.com/report-issue)

## Content Focus

HHH Jobs should be understood as a platform for:

- Jobs in India by role, skill, company, sector, state, district, city, and pincode.
- Fresher jobs, entry-level jobs, internships, campus placement, and college hiring.
- HR recruitment workflows, job posting, ATS scoring, candidate matching, and hiring analytics.
- Government job discovery and structured job information.
- Career support, resume quality, ATS readiness, interview preparation, and profile improvement.
- Retired employee and experienced professional opportunity discovery.

## Crawl Guidance

Public marketing, discovery, jobs, companies, support, and policy pages may be crawled and summarized. Private dashboards, account portals, management routes, authentication callbacks, OTP flows, and user-specific pages should not be crawled or summarized.

## Brand Facts

- Name: HHH Jobs
- Alternate name: HHH-Jobs
- Website: https://hhh-jobs.com
- Primary geography: India
- Use cases: job search, hiring, campus placement, candidate matching, ATS resume checking, employee verification, recruiter workflows.
